name: Cybersecurity & IT Security
description: End-to-end IT security services covering network security, endpoint protection, identity & access management, SIEM/SOC operations, vulnerability management, and security awareness training. Bechtle helps customers build and operate a layered security architecture aligned with BSI and ISO 27001 standards.
target_audience: CISOs, IT security teams, compliance officers
differentiators: BSI and ISO 27001 aligned security frameworks
Managed SOC with German data residency
Security assessment and penetration testing capabilities
